name: Stonly Interactive Knowledge Base API
what_it_does: Interactive knowledge base and guided support platform with REST API — enabling teams to create step-by-step interactive guides, decision trees, and in-app widgets for customer self-service, agent assist in support tools, and employee onboarding, with analytics on guide performance and completion rates.
use_cases: Querying guide engagement analytics for knowledge base optimization
Managing interactive guide content programmatically for product update automation
Integrating Stonly guides into support workflows (Zendesk, Intercom) via API
Pulling completion and abandonment rates for guide effectiveness reporting
Automating guide deployment to new user segments based on product events
not_for: Traditional static knowledge base articles (use Helpjuice or Document360 for static KB)
In-app product onboarding tours (use Chameleon or Appcues for DAP tours)
Developer documentation (use GitBook or ReadMe for technical docs)
best_when: A customer support or product team wants to create interactive, decision-tree-based guides for customer self-service that adapt to user answers — reducing support ticket volume by guiding users to the right solution.
avoid_when: You need traditional static help articles, developer documentation, or in-app onboarding product tours rather than interactive self-service guides.

auth.notes: API key from Stonly account settings. Bearer token auth. Workspace-scoped access. JavaScript SDK for in-app widget embedding. Webhook for guide completion and feedback events. No OAuth2. Zendesk, Intercom, Freshdesk native integrations.

pricing.notes: French company (Paris). Founded 2018. Raised $22M Series A (2022). Backed by Headline VC. Interactive guide differentiator — decision-tree format vs static FAQs. Agent assist mode embedded in Zendesk/Intercom. Multilingual guides. Widget can be embedded anywhere. AI guide creation from existing content. Popular with SaaS companies wanting to reduce support ticket volume.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for guides, steps, analytics, and widget configuration. Bearer token auth. Good documentation. JavaScript SDK required for in-app widget. Guide creation primarily in Stonly editor — API manages deployment and reads analytics. Webhook for completion events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Guide reads fully idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. Step reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: JavaScript SDK required for in-app widget deployment
Guide creation is in Stonly editor — not API-driven authoring
Support tool integrations (Zendesk, Intercom) configured in admin
GDPR: guide interaction data is behavioral — consent for EU users
Multilingual guides require separate content management per language

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. EU and US data residency. Bearer token auth. Guide completion data is user behavioral PII — GDPR consent for EU. JavaScript widget requires CSP review. French company with GDPR-native design. Agent assist mode accesses support ticket context — scope review needed.
